news.caption: An update is available for My Example App.

apps.name: Hex Code Getter
apps.subtitle: Color to your heart's content- accurately.
apps.localizedDescription:
Hex Code Getter allows you to make any character into a ready-to-use color palette. Add a character from your photo library, a search by name, or a Wikipedia article — the app automatically removes the background, finds the dominant colors, and hands you clean #RRGGBB hex codes you can tap to copy.

Perfect for artists, designers, cosplayers, and anyone who wants a character's exact colors without eyedropping by hand.

Features
• Add characters from a photo, a web image search by name, or a Wikipedia link
• Automatic background removal so only the character's colors are detected
• Dominant-color extraction into a tidy hex palette, with copy-ready #RRGGBB codes
• Filter palettes by color family — reds, blues, greens, browns, and more
• Save characters into folders to organize your collections
• Fast, on-device color analysis

apps.name: Goose Clicker
apps.subtitle: Who's really more important?
apps.localizedDescription:
Goose Clicker is an idle game about one alarmingly productive goose.

Tap to lay golden eggs, then hire farmhands, build coops and conveyor belts, and buy upgrades that slowly turn your humble egg farm into something far larger.

• Tap the goose to lay golden eggs
• Hire idle producers that keep earning while you're away
• Unlock upgrades and watch each part of the farm transform

Free-range, ethically ambiguous, wildly profitable.

versions.localizedDescription:
What's new in 1.3:
• Fresh new app icon

What's new in 1.2:
• Shop egg count stays pinned while you scroll
• Upgrades now shown in a swipeable 2×2 grid
• Farmhands give the goose more room — no more overlapping

What's new in 1.1:
• Bigger, easier-to-tap mute button
• New "cha-ching" sound when buying from the shop
• Golden-yellow accent across the tab bar, mute button, and shop
• Refreshed tab icons, with the first tab now "Home"
• Shop egg count stays pinned while you scroll
• Upgrades now shown in a swipeable 2×2 grid
• Farmhands give the goose more room — no more overlapping

apps.name: Custom Watch Faces
apps.subtitle: Customize your Apple Watch!
apps.localizedDescription:
Custom Watch Faces brings a bespoke, always-on face to your Apple Watch. Open the app to display a full-screen animated watch face designed to stay lit while it's on your wrist.

• A clean, full-screen animated watch face
• Built to stay awake while you glance down
• Lightweight and simple to use

A fun, personalized way to give your Apple Watch a fresh look.
